policies.measure_name: RE Grid as Energy Security Shield
policies.pillar: Utilizing existing RE capacity to stabilize market pricing.
policies.impact_assessment: Wholesale prices €37–57/MWh vs €113 Germany, €141 Italy; gas sets price only 15% of time vs 89% in Italy.

policies.pillar: Comprehensive crisis response package targeting end-use energy costs and grid tolls.
policies.impact_assessment: VAT on energy cut 21%→10%; electricity bills cut 13%; 80% grid toll reduction for energy-intensive industry (~€200M savings).

policies.measure_name: Income Tax Deductions for Household RE Installations
policies.pillar: Inclusion of household clean tech incentives within the €5B crisis package.
policies.impact_assessment: Massive income tax deductions for rooftop solar, EV charging points, heat pumps; accelerated RE permitting.

policies.pillar: Major financing strategy targeting grid operations and clean energy capacity.
policies.impact_assessment: €500M equity fund for grid operators; €500M pilot for 'energy efficiency as a service'; €200M InvestEU for SMRs.

policies.pillar: Expedited consultation on post-2030 frameworks ahead of 2026 legislative proposals.
policies.impact_assessment: RE reached 25.2% of energy (2024), ~48% of electricity (2025).

policies.pillar: Framework adjustment for long-term emission reductions.
policies.impact_assessment: Streamlining energy efficiency rules to support 90% emissions reduction by 2040.

policies.pillar: Cross-border and domestic grid financing package.
policies.impact_assessment: 500+ GW new RE capacity; 8 cross-border 'Energy Highways'; 180 new transmission projects, 51 storage projects.

policies.pillar: Wind expansion framework.
policies.impact_assessment: #ERROR!

policies.measure_name: Consumer Demand Surge for Distributed RE
policies.pillar: Observed surge in private consumer demand for household transition technology.
policies.impact_assessment: E.ON solar inquiries doubled; 1KOMMA5° demand doubled vs prior month; Enpal demand at 2022 gas crisis levels.

policies.pillar: Expedited auction timeline for renewable allocation.
policies.impact_assessment: AR8 brought forward to Jul 2026; prior AR7 secured 14.7 GW across 201 projects, saving UK ~£4B/yr at current gas prices.

policies.pillar: Mandate for low-carbon tech in new residential construction.
policies.impact_assessment: All new homes in England to include solar panels + heat pumps from 2028; plug-in solar panels to retail shops within months.

policies.pillar: Strategic funding for maritime transport decarbonization.
policies.impact_assessment: Capital allocated for zero-emission vessel development and deployment.

policies.pillar: Macroeconomic modeling of Net Zero vs fossil price shocks.
policies.impact_assessment: Total cost of net zero by 2050 'no greater than the cost of a single fossil fuel price shock'.

policies.measure_name: EV Market Surge as Energy Security Buffer
policies.pillar: Consumer vehicle market reaction to regional energy pricing.
policies.impact_assessment: Used EV 'bonanza' on Finn.no marketplace; electricity costs €15.77 vs €35.23 in Germany.

policies.measure_name: Solar Boom as Energy Security Buffer
policies.pillar: Heavy deployment of imported solar modules bypassing central grid reliance.
policies.impact_assessment: Solar provides ~20–25% of electricity; $12B oil/gas imports avoided since 2020; projected additional $6.3B savings in 2026.

policies.pillar: Adjustment to net-metering contracts for distributed generation.
policies.impact_assessment: Net metering shifted to net billing; standard agreement cut from 7 to 5 years.

policies.pillar: Consumer and localized state shift toward electric cooking amid gas shortages.
policies.impact_assessment: E-cooking now ~20% cheaper than LPG; ₹2/unit electricity subsidy for eateries switching to induction.

policies.measure_name: Existing RE Capacity as Resilience Buffer
policies.pillar: Status of baseline domestic renewable generation capacity.
policies.impact_assessment: Solar alone ~143 GW; 500 GW target by 2030; ~35 GW faces curtailment risk from grid bottlenecks.

policies.pillar: Revision of long-term targets and local distance regulations.
policies.impact_assessment: 20% RE in generation by 2030; legislative reform removing local distance restrictions on solar; grid innovation plan within 6 months.

policies.pillar: Physical grid expansion targeting heavy industry sectors.
policies.impact_assessment: Transmission capacity established beneath planned highway corridor to Yongin semiconductor cluster.

policies.pillar: Market tracking of ongoing solar deployment.
policies.impact_assessment: Passing 100 GW cumulative capacity; solar + wind reaching 11% of total energy.

policies.pillar: Response measures promoting distributed generation amid reserve drops.
policies.impact_assessment: First country to declare energy emergency; rooftop solar + storage promoted for diesel-dependent areas.

policies.pillar: Expediting untapped domestic renewable reserves.
policies.impact_assessment: Speeding up solar and geothermal integration into the national energy plan.

policies.measure_name: Solar Crisis Buffer and E10 Biofuel
policies.pillar: Fuel substitution measures leveraging existing solar and biofuels.
policies.impact_assessment: Solar saves 'hundreds of millions of dollars' in potential coal/gas imports; E10 gasoline rollout accelerated; zero fuel taxes until Apr 15.

policies.measure_name: EV Incentives and Gov Fleet Electrification
policies.pillar: Vehicle procurement mandates acting as fuel demand reduction.
policies.impact_assessment: Slashed EV service fees; ordered govt agencies not to buy new gas vehicles; 3-day school week; 4-day workweek.

policies.measure_name: Fuel Efficiency Mandates and EV Promotion
policies.pillar: State measures promoting EVs amid physical fuel station closures.
policies.impact_assessment: Strict fuel efficiency for state bodies; fuel prices rose 68%; electric mobility actively promoted.

policies.measure_name: RE and Electrification as Crisis Buffer
policies.pillar: Macroeconomic analysis of existing domestic resilience parameters.
policies.impact_assessment: 4M+ households with solar; 454,000 EVs on road; FBT EV exemption costs $9.7B over 2026–30.

policies.measure_name: EV Import Mandate and Hydropower Buffer
policies.pillar: Ongoing market transition relying on structural regulatory bans.
policies.impact_assessment: Banned gasoline/diesel car imports (2024); EVs grew 1%→6% of market.

policies.pillar: Forced demand destruction and building efficiency measures.
policies.impact_assessment: Mandatory 9pm commercial closure; street lights dimmed; billboards off; govt vehicle fuel cut ~30%.

policies.pillar: Biofuel blending requirements to offset petroleum imports.
policies.impact_assessment: Increasing ethanol content in petrol to stretch limited fuel supplies.

policies.measure_name: Solar Rooftop Mandate for New Buildings
policies.pillar: Pre-existing structural building codes targeting energy autonomy.
policies.impact_assessment: All new residential buildings must install solar; non-residential >250 sqm roof; needs 18–23 GW solar + 5.5 GW/33 GWh storage.

policies.pillar: Attempt to offset fuel blockade via domestic solar expansion.
policies.impact_assessment: ~38% of daytime generation from solar; 24% RE target by 2030; full transition needs $8–10B over decade.

policies.pillar: Localized demand reduction and zero-carbon transport pivots.
policies.impact_assessment: Encouraging walking/non-fossil transport; decentralizing activities to local level; drastically cutting consumption.

policies.pillar: Legislative and market contraction of renewable project pipelines.
policies.impact_assessment: TotalEnergies paid ~$1B to abandon 2 wind leases; IRA wind/solar credits truncated.

policies.pillar: Mixed regulatory actions regarding domestic solar policy.
policies.impact_assessment: Interior reviewing ~20 stuck solar projects; residential 30% ITC eliminated.

policies.pillar: Organic domestic market reactions to retail gasoline inflation.
policies.impact_assessment: Gas up 27% to $4.29/gal; CarEdge EV searches up 20%; Chevy EV searches up 30%+.

policies.measure_name: High EV Adoption as Energy Security Buffer
policies.pillar: Sustained penetration of non-fossil vehicles in domestic market.
policies.impact_assessment: 70%+ of new car sales are electric.

policies.pillar: Recommended behavioral adjustments for demand destruction.
policies.impact_assessment: WFH; cut highway speed by 10 km/h; switch to electric cooking; carpooling; industrial efficiency.

policies.pillar: Institutional assessment of geopolitical energy vulnerabilities.
policies.impact_assessment: Called fossil dependence 'ripping away national security and sovereignty' at Green Growth Summit.

policies.measure_name: ASEAN Special Meeting on Energy Security
policies.pillar: Bloc-level strategic statements on long-term efficiency goals.
policies.impact_assessment: Referenced ASEAN Renewable Energy Roadmap; member states' efficiency measures projected to reduce demand by 32.7% by 2050.

policies.pillar: High-level political commitments linking finance to RE deployments.
policies.impact_assessment: First combined finance/energy/central bank format; Energy Commissioner called for reducing fossil imports, boosting RE production.

policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: Encouraging walking/non-fossil transport; decentralizing activities to local level; drastically cutting consumption

policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: 5 offshore wind projects halted; TotalEnergies paid ~$1B to abandon 2 wind leases redirected to oil/gas; IRA wind/solar credits truncated (construction by end 2026, completion by end 2027)

policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Trump shared pro-rooftop-solar video; Interior reviewing ~20 stuck solar projects; residential 30% ITC eliminated by OBBBA (effective Jan 1, 2026)

policies.measure_name: Consumer EV Interest Surge (No Policy Support)
policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: Gas up 27% to $4.29/gal ($6.81 SF); CarEdge EV searches up 20%; Edmunds: electrified vehicle shopping rose 20.7%→22.4%; Chevy EV searches up 30%+

policies.measure_name: High EV Adoption as Energy Security Buffer
policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: 70%+ of new car sales are electric

policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: Vehicle refueling limits; fuel rationing; early Ramadan holidays; universities closed; malls/restaurants closed at 9pm; temporary blackouts

policies.measure_name: Fuel Rationing and Public Holiday Mandate
policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: Every Wednesday declared public holiday; 15 L/week for motorists; 200 L for public transport; QR-based National Fuel Pass

policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: Alternating driving days by license plate number; QR codes to prevent multiple refills

policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: 400M barrels released (>2× previous record); one-third of total government stockpiles

policies.measure_name: RE Acceleration Statements and 2026 Crisis Policy Tracker Launch
policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Renewables = 85% of all new global power capacity in 2025; 90%+ of new RE projects cheaper than fossil alternatives; launched 2026 Energy Crisis Policy Response Tracker

policies.pillar: Electrification
policies.quantifiable_targets: WFH; cut highway speed by 10 km/h; switch to electric cooking; carpooling; divert LPG to essential uses; industrial efficiency

policies.measure_name: Executive Secretary Stiell Statement on Fossil Dependency
policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Called fossil dependence 'ripping away national security and sovereignty'; speech at Green Growth Summit

policies.measure_name: Energy Transition Finance and Crisis Analysis Publications
policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Global energy transition investment reached $2.4T in 2024 (20% increase); RE investment at $807B; grid investment needs $671B/yr through 2030; COP29 target: 1,500 GW storage by 2030

policies.measure_name: Special Foreign Ministers Meeting on Energy Security
policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Joint statement on energy security/resilience; referenced ASEAN Renewable Energy Long-Term Roadmap; member states' efficiency measures projected to reduce demand by 32.7% by 2050

policies.measure_name: Emergency Joint Finance, Energy and Central Bank Meeting
policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: First combined finance/energy/central bank format in G7 history since 1975; Energy Commissioner called for 'reducing fossil imports, boosting RE production, establishing energy union'

policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
policies.quantifiable_targets: Called crisis 'Asia's Ukraine moment'; scaling up EVs could save importers >$600B/yr in oil imports; Pakistan solar saved $12B+ since 2020

policies.pillar: Renewable Energy
